title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Tonsillitis
description: Zingiber officinale tinctures contains a compound called gingerol, which is a key bioactive constituent that helps with tonsillitis. Gingerol has anti-inflammatory properties that reduce swelling and pain in the throat. It also contains a compound called shogaol, which has antimicrobial properties that fight off bacterial infections that can cause tonsillitis.
